definitions.text: det innerste rommet i Salomos tempel, der paktens ark stod
definitions.translation: the innermost chamber of Solomon's temple, where the Ark of the Covenant stood

definitions.text: i overført betydning, ofte spøkefullt: rom der det mest verdifulle oppbevares, sjefskontor eller lignende
definitions.translation: in a transferred sense, often humorously: room where the most valuable things are kept, boss's office or similar
